_comment: Committed, always-on. The 'deny' list is the hard safety backstop (enforced even under bypassPermissions). The 'allow' list reduces prompts when running in a prompting mode (default/plan). Unattended auto-run lives in the gitignored .claude/settings.local.json (defaultMode: bypassPermissions) so it stays on Brian's machine only.
_hooks_comment: Deterministic enforcement layer for unattended runs (active in ALL permission modes, incl. bypassPermissions). PreToolUse world_yaml_additive_guard.py hard-blocks (exit 2) any Edit/Write/MultiEdit that would net-delete lines from data/worlds/clone_wars/{planets,maps}/*.yaml (map-safety invariant). PostToolUse post_edit_validate.py py_compiles edited *.py and yaml.safe_loads edited *.yaml, surfacing syntax errors back to Claude (exit 2). Command prefers venv python (has PyYAML), falls back to PATH python; ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.} resolves absolute at hook runtime or relative to cwd. Hooks reload on settings change / session start. Scripts are committed under .claude/hooks/.
